title: Get 40% Bonus GTA$ on Qualifying Shark Cards
headline: Get 40% Bonus GTA$ on Qualifying Shark Cards
subtitle: Offer Valid Through August 5
content:
Take advantage of the special offer you claimed for 40% bonus GTA$ on qualifying Shark Cards.

Purchase a Great White, Whale, or Megalodon Shark Card to receive 40% bonus GTA$, and use your newfound resources to add the Art Studio to your Mansion property in preparation for The Kortz Center Heist, this summer's new GTA Online update.

Must claim this offer by July 22 at 11:59 PM ET and complete purchase of qualifying Shark Cards by August 5 at 11:59 PM ET to receive bonus.
